title: retrieve profile
text: retrieve profile A range of one or more values for one or more fields in an entity often containing profile characters , that can be used to control the scope of the data to be retrieved from the database. Related Links entity A development object that defines a logical data aggregation and its associated default characteristics and behavior. It may be mapped to a table in a database, but it can also represent transient data, a collection of controls, or constant data. profile character A Uniface wildcard character or relational operator used to build a retrieve profile.
